# Welcome to WHITE DIAMOND Discussions

This is the place for conversations about the WHITE DIAMOND design specification.

## Categories

### General
Open-ended discussions about design philosophy, principles, and approach.

### Q&A
Questions about how specifications apply to specific situations.

### Ideas
Proposals for new specifications or improvements to existing ones.

### Show and Tell
Share implementations or examples of WHITE DIAMOND in practice.

### Announcements
Official updates from maintainers.

## Guidelines

- Be respectful and constructive
- Stay on topic
- Search before posting to avoid duplicates
- Use appropriate categories
- Follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Getting Started

New here? Start with the [Core Principles](../docs/philosophy/core-principles.md) to understand what WHITE DIAMOND is about.
